text: SSO with Azure AD is mandatory for us. We can't roll out without it.
Please add SCIM provisioning. Managing users manually is painful.
Your Gantt view is great but exporting to PDF breaks the layout.
We need audit logs: who changed what and when, for compliance.
App is slow when opening a project with 500+ tasks. Takes 10-15 seconds.
Notifications are too noisy. I want granular settings per project.
